home.title: Storefront
home.tagline: One storefront for products, services, bookings, stays, and listings.

hero.title: Everything worth buying, booking, and discovering in one place.
hero.description: Browse curated products, book services, reserve trips and stays, and explore listings with one polished customer experience.

collections.title: A storefront built for many ways to sell
collections.description: Physical goods, digital items, services, tours, hotels, tickets, and properties can all live in one tenant experience.

smartKit.name: Smart living kit
smartKit.description: A ready bundle for connected homes and modern offices.

designPack.name: Brand launch pack
designPack.description: Digital templates, launch assets, and campaign-ready files.

homeCleaning.name: Premium home cleaning
homeCleaning.description: Book vetted teams with clear slots and upfront pricing.

desertTour.name: Desert sunset tour
desertTour.description: Guided group experience with tickets and pickup options.

cityHotel.name: City view hotel stay
cityHotel.description: Flexible nightly stays with instant booking flow.

marinaApartment.name: Marina apartment listing
marinaApartment.description: Premium property listing with rich media and lead capture.

trust.title: Built for confident customers
trust.description: Clear product types, localized flows, secure account access, and support signals keep visitors moving.

support.title: Guide visitors from interest to action
support.description: The home page prepares the path for AI discovery, live support, account access, and later checkout flows.

footer.title: Ready to explore Zain Lak?
footer.description: Start with the featured collections or jump straight into services and bookings.

login.title: Welcome back
login.description: Sign in to continue shopping, booking, and managing your account.

register.title: Create your account
register.description: Join Zain Lak to save orders, bookings, rewards, and wallet activity.

recover.title: Recover access
recover.description: Enter your email and we will send recovery instructions.

reset.title: Reset password
reset.description: Choose a new password for your account.

confirm.title: Confirm your account
confirm.description: Enter the verification code we sent to you.

fields.name: Full name
fields.terms: I agree to the terms and privacy policy

validation.terms: You must accept the terms to continue.

errors.credentials: The email or password is incorrect.
errors.validation: Check the highlighted fields and try again.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait and try again.
errors.network: We could not reach the server. Check your connection and retry.
errors.server: Something went wrong on our side. Please try again.

errors.crashedHint: Try again - if it keeps happening, send us the code below.
